mapper.insert: INSERT INTO CODE_DICTIONARY_VERSION ( version_id, upload_id, version_label, status, approved_at, approved_by, is_active, created_at ) VALUES ( #{versionId}, #{uploadId}, #{versionLabel}, #{status}, #{approvedAt}, #{approvedBy}, #{isActive}, #{createdAt} )
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM CODE_DICTIONARY_VERSION ORDER BY created_at DESC, version_id DESC FETCH FIRST 1 ROWS ONLY
SELECT * FROM CODE_DICTIONARY_VERSION WHERE is_active = 'Y' AND status = 'APPROVED' ORDER BY approved_at DESC, version_id DESC FETCH FIRST 1 ROWS ONLY
SELECT * FROM CODE_DICTIONARY_VERSION ORDER BY created_at DESC, version_id DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE CODE_DICTIONARY_VERSION SET is_active = 'N' WHERE is_active = 'Y'
